name: Linear Project Management
description: Issues, projects, cycles, teams, roadmap via Linear's official MCP

env_vars.how_to_set: linear.app → Settings → API → Personal API Keys → Create key

tools.name: list_issues
tools.description: List Linear issues with optional filters for team, state, assignee, label, or priority

team_id.description: Filter issues by Linear team ID

state.description: Filter by issue state name (e.g. In Progress, Done, Backlog)

assignee_id.description: Filter issues by assignee user ID

tools.name: create_issue
tools.description: Create a new Linear issue in a team with title, description, priority, and label assignments

team_id.description: The Linear team ID to create the issue in

label_ids.description: List of label IDs to apply to the issue

tools.name: update_issue
tools.description: Update an existing Linear issue's title, state, assignee, priority, or estimate

issue_id.description: The Linear issue ID to update

state_id.description: New workflow state ID for the issue

assignee_id.description: User ID to assign the issue to

tools.name: list_teams
tools.description: List all Linear teams in the workspace with their IDs, names, and workflow states

tools.name: get_viewer
tools.description: Get the authenticated user's Linear profile including ID, name, email, and team memberships
